sources.title: The Whistler (restored, colorized) (1944, film noir, imdb score: 6.3)
sources.description: The Whistler is a 1944 American  mystery film   noir  directed by  William Castle  and starring  Richard Dix ,  Gloria Stuart  and  J. Carrol Naish . Based on the  radio drama   The Whistler , it was the first of  Columbia Pictures ' eight " Whistler " films starring Richard Dix produced in the 1940s.

metadata.Plot: A man, despondent over the death of his wife, wants to commit suicide but can't bring himself to do it. He hires a man to hire a professional killer to do the job. However, he soon finds out that his wife isn't really dead - but the man he paid to hire the hitman is, and he has no idea who the man hired or how to get him to call off the hit.
metadata.Actors: Richard Dix, Gloria Stuart, J. Carrol Naish
